description: World Memory System configuration — all tunable thresholds, windows, and evaluator parameters.

position_sampler.description: Real-time seconds between position breadcrumb recordings.

retention.description: Controls event pruning. prune_age_threshold = game-time before events are pruneable. timeline_window = game-time per mandatory marker. prune_interval = game-time between prune cycles.

event_recorder.description: Prime sieve generates primes up to this limit for interpretation triggers. chunk_size must match core/config.py CHUNK_SIZE.

interpreter.description: Controls how interpretations propagate up the geographic hierarchy.

npc_local.description: Default window for NPC context queries.

query_thresholds.description: Minimum relevance scores and display limits for query results.

layer3.description: Layer 3 consolidation config. trigger_interval = run every N Layer 2 events. min_l2_per_district = minimum L2 events in a district to consolidate. min_categories_per_district = alternative trigger if 2+ categories present.

layer4.description: Layer 4 province summarization config. trigger_threshold = tag-weighted point threshold (positional: 1st=10, 2nd=8, 3rd=6, 4th=5, 5th=4, 6th=3, 7-12th=2, 13th+=1). max_l3_per_province = max L3 events to include in prompt. max_l2_relevance = max L2 supporting-detail events (filtered to trigger tag in top 3 positions).

layer5.description: Layer 5 realm summarization config. Same per-realm WeightedTriggerBucket pattern as Layer 4 but at realm scale. trigger_threshold defaults to 100 (twice Layer 4) because realm summaries should be rarer than province summaries. max_l4_per_realm = max L4 events in prompt. max_l3_relevance = max Layer 3 supporting-detail events (two-layers-down visibility, filtered by fired-tag overlap). min_provinces_contributing = optional minimum province diversity gate (set to 2+ in multi-realm worlds to avoid single-province realm summaries).

population_change.description: Narrates enemy kill counts in a region.

resource_pressure.description: Narrates resource gathering counts in a region.

narrative_templates.major: Player has died {deaths} times in {region} and taken damage {damage} times.
narrative_templates.significant_death: Player has died 1 time in {region} and taken damage {damage} times.
narrative_templates.significant_deaths: Player has died {deaths} times in {region} and taken damage {damage} times.
narrative_templates.moderate: Player has taken damage {damage} times in {region}.
narrative_templates.minor: Player has taken damage {damage} times in {region}.

area_danger.description: Narrates combat damage and death counts in a region.

player_milestones.description: Detects notable player achievements: kill counts, levels, crafting quality.

crafting_trends.description: Narrates crafting activity counts and quality breakdown.

evaluators._comment_new_evaluators: All new evaluators below use get_evaluator_config() with these defaults. If a key is missing, the evaluator falls back to its hardcoded default.

combat_kills_regional_low_tier.description: Narrates T1-T2 enemy kill counts in a region.

combat_kills_regional_high_tier.description: Narrates T3-T4 enemy kill counts in a region.

combat_kills_global.description: Narrates total enemy kill counts globally.

combat_damage_regional.description: Narrates damage taken and death counts in a region.

combat_style.description: Narrates dodge, status effect, and attack counts.

gathering_regional.description: Narrates resource gathering counts in a region.

gathering_depletion.description: Narrates node depletion counts in a region. TODO: needs total node count per chunk from Layer 1 to calculate percentages.

gathering_global.description: Narrates total resource gathering counts globally.

crafting_minigame.description: Narrates crafting quality achievements across disciplines.

crafting_inventions.description: Narrates item inventions and recipe discoveries.

progression_skills.description: Narrates skill learning and usage counts.

progression_identity.description: Narrates title earned and class change events.

exploration_territory.description: Narrates chunk entries and area discoveries.

economy_flow.description: Narrates item acquisition and consumption totals.

items_inventory.description: Narrates per-item acquisition and consumption counts.
